what: Show the KnowledgeDetailPanel inline in the main content area when the user clicks an entry in the sidebar
why: User selected an entry from the knowledge sidebar and wants to view or edit its content

modes.view: All fields displayed as read-only text; Edit button (top-right) and disabled Delete button
modes.edit: All fields as editable inputs using EditForm; Save Changes + Cancel buttons; Delete button enabled

success_handling.criteria: User saves changes to the entry; panel returns to view mode with updated data

decisions.rationale: The vault detail page has dedicated space for the knowledge panel; an inline panel is less disruptive than a modal dialog in this context

decisions.reason: View mode first, then edit mode on demand
decisions.rationale: User typically wants to read before editing; separating modes prevents accidental changes
